@returns {{filter: string|undefined, reportCount: {op: string, value: number}|undefined, mongoTransformer: Function|undefined}}\\n50:      */\\n51:     #extractReportCountFilter(filterString) {\\n52: count.reports to reportCount option\\n60:         let reportCount;\\n61:         if (countReportsFilter?.['count.reports'] !== undefined) {\\n62:             const val = // If there's remaining filter, use transformer to replace parsed result\\n79:         // Otherwise, no filter needed\\n80:         if (remainingFilter && Object.keys(remainingFilter).length > 0) {\\n81:             return {\\n82:                 filter: filterString, // Keep original string for NQL to parse\\n83:                 reportCount,\\n84:                 mongoTransformer: () => remainingFilter // Replace with our pre-split result\\n85:             };\\n86:         }\\n87: \\n88:         return {filter: undefined, reportCount, mongoTransformer: undefined};\\n89:     }\\n90:
